summary: Move section vertical padding inside the charcoal background panel by adding py-10 md:py-24 to the container div, and normalizing section padding to the standard py-10 sm:py-16 pattern. This follows the exact approach used by TestimonialsCarousel.
analysis: Analyzed all 6 dark-mode blocks in the theme. The standard dark-mode pattern places section vertical padding OUTSIDE the charcoal pseudo-element. Most blocks use py-10 sm:py-16 on the section and no inner padding on the container, which means the charcoal area has no top/bottom breathing room -- the content starts flush at the charcoal edge. However, TestimonialsCarousel is the exception: it uses py-10 sm:py-16 on the section AND py-16 md:py-24 on the container div. This places 64px (mobile) / 96px (md+) of padding INSIDE the charcoal panel, matching the Figma intent where the Content wrapper has py-[96px] on the SAME element as the charcoal background. The DynamicContentCarousel currently has py-10 sm:py-24 on the section (non-standard -- other blocks use sm:py-16) and no padding on the container. The fix is to: (1) normalize section padding to py-10 sm:py-16, and (2) add py-10 md:py-24 to the container div, exactly matching TestimonialsCarousel. At mobile, the before:-inset-(--side-gutter) extends the charcoal by --side-gutter (16px at mobile, 32px at md) in all directions including vertically. With py-10 (40px) on the container at mobile, the content will have 40px inside the charcoal. At desktop with py-24 (96px), this matches the Figma 96px specification.

fileChanges.description: Change section padding from py-10 sm:py-24 to py-10 sm:py-16 (standard pattern), and add py-10 md:py-24 to the container div to put vertical padding inside the charcoal panel
fileChanges.details: Line 94: Change 'dynamic-content-carousel dark bg-transparent! py-10 sm:py-24' to 'dynamic-content-carousel dark bg-transparent! py-10 sm:py-16'. Line 95: Change container div class from 'container relative before:absolute...' to 'container relative py-10 md:py-24 before:absolute...'

fileChanges.description: Mirror the PHP changes in the editor component: change section className padding and add inner padding to container div
fileChanges.details: Line 363: Change 'dynamic-content-carousel dark bg-transparent! py-10 sm:py-24' to 'dynamic-content-carousel dark bg-transparent! py-10 sm:py-16'. Line 369: Change container div className from 'container relative before:absolute...' to 'container relative py-10 md:py-24 before:absolute...'

designDecisions.question: Should the 96px vertical padding be inside or outside the charcoal background panel?
designDecisions.recommendation: Inside. The Figma node 653:29365 shows py-[var(--margin/margin-7, 96px)] on the Content wrapper, which is the SAME element as the charcoal background. This means the 96px is INSIDE the charcoal. The TestimonialsCarousel block already implements this correctly with py-16 md:py-24 on the container div.

designDecisions.question: What should the section (outer) padding be?
designDecisions.recommendation: py-10 sm:py-16 -- the standard dark-mode section padding used by CardsCarousel, FeaturedPost, and TestimonialsCarousel. The current py-10 sm:py-24 is non-standard and places too much space outside the charcoal.

designDecisions.question: What should the mobile inner padding be?
designDecisions.recommendation: py-10 (40px) on mobile, matching TestimonialsCarousel's py-16 proportionally scaled down. The Figma 96px value is for desktop; mobile typically uses smaller values. TestimonialsCarousel uses py-16 (64px) at mobile which is generous; py-10 (40px) provides adequate breathing room at small screens while the md:py-24 (96px) handles desktop. This matches the Figma spec for desktop exactly.
